headline: UK Sanctions HTX Crypto Exchange Over Russia Ties

article.title: UK authorities sanction HTX crypto exchange over support for Russia
article.summary: Formerly Huobi Global, the exchange is the latest entity to be named as part of a crackdown on companies “exploited by Russia to circumvent UK sanctions.”

article.title: TeraWulf acquires Kentucky AI data center site with planned 1 GW capacity
article.summary: WULF shares surged on Tuesday after the Bitcoin miner announced its latest move to expand into AI and HPC through a multi-phase buildout through 2030.

article.title: Gold Declines as Gulf Strikes Cloud Interest Rate Outlook
article.summary: Gold fell as military strikes in the Persian Gulf dimmed hopes for a US-Iran peace deal and reinforced concerns that persistent inflation could keep interest rates higher for longer.

headline: US Nat Gas Slides 2% Amid Expiration

article.title: US Natural Gas Drops in Thin Trading as Options Contracts Expire
article.summary: US natural gas futures fell just before options contracts for front-month delivery expired, erasing earlier gains that had been triggered by an increase in domestic gas supplies flowing to liquefied natural gas export terminals on the Gulf Coast. headline: Spain Bans 2 Crypto Markets Over Gambling Laws

article.summary: Spain is the latest country to clamp down on the rising use of prediction market platforms like Polymarket and Kalshi.

headline: Crypto Bias: 40% AI Chatbots Favor Catholic Views

article.title: AI Chatbots Show Bias Toward Catholicism, Researchers Say
article.summary: Researchers find AI models steer users toward Catholicism and away from other religions, like Jehovah’s Witnesses.

headline: Crypto Bill Faces 2024 Delay Amid Gridlock

article.title: TD Cowen says crypto bill unlikely to pass this year amid worsening political environment
article.summary: The political environment around the Clarity Act is getting worse, TD Cowen says, making it harder for the crypto bill to pass this year.
